services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked or broken screen replaced with OEM-quality parts. All brands and resolutions — FHD, QHD, OLED. Colour calibrated and tested before handover.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Genuine-spec cells restore full capacity. We test and report battery health before and after. Covers all laptop models including MacBook.

services.name: Keyboard Replacement
services.description: Full keyboard swap or individual key repair for sticky, broken, or missing keys. UK and US layouts available. Backlit keyboards fully supported.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Loose, damaged or broken charging ports. USB-C, MagSafe and barrel connectors all covered. Port cleaning included for intermittent charging faults.

services.name: RAM Upgrade
services.description: Boost multitasking performance without buying a new laptop. We advise the best upgrade path for your specific model and test under load after fitting.

services.name: SSD / Storage Upgrade
services.description: Replace a slow spinning hard drive or upgrade to a faster NVMe SSD. Full data migration included — everything as you left it, just much faster.

services.name: Overheating Fix
services.description: Thermal paste replacement, deep fan cleaning and heatsink reseating. We benchmark temps before and after to confirm the fix — prevents long-term CPU damage.

services.name: Water Damage Recovery
services.description: Board-level inspection, ultrasonic cleaning and controlled drying. Best chance of saving your laptop after a spill. No fix, no fee applies — power off immediately and call us.

services.name: PC Repair & Diagnostics
services.description: Full hardware and software diagnosis of any desktop fault. We identify and fix the root cause — not just the symptom. All components bench-tested and load-tested.

services.name: Custom PC Build
services.description: We source, assemble, cable-manage and configure your dream build. Gaming, workstation or home office. OS installation, driver setup and benchmark testing included.

services.name: PC Upgrade
services.description: GPU, CPU, RAM or storage upgrades with full compatibility checking before any parts are ordered. Performance benchmarking before and after upgrade included.

services.name: No Power Fix
services.description: PSU testing, motherboard diagnosis and component-level fault finding. We carry common PSU models for same-day swap if needed. Won't start? We'll find out why.

services.name: Graphics Card Repair
services.description: Reflow, reballing and thermal compound replacement for failing GPUs. Covers NVIDIA and AMD cards. Artifacts, black screen and driver crash faults all diagnosed.

services.name: Dust Clean & Maintenance
services.description: Deep compressed-air clean, thermal paste refresh on CPU/GPU and a full health check. Extends component life significantly and reduces noise. Recommended annually.

services.name: Windows Reinstall
services.description: Clean Windows 11 install with all drivers. Data backed up to external drive first and restored after. Activation included. Your apps re-installed and configured to your preferences.

services.name: Driver Installation
services.description: Missing or corrupt drivers fixed. Sound, graphics, network, Bluetooth, printer and specialist hardware drivers. No more yellow warning signs in Device Manager.

services.name: Software Setup
services.description: Installation and configuration of any software. Microsoft 365, Adobe Creative Cloud, Zoom, Slack, specialist business tools. Licences transferred and accounts signed in.

services.name: PC Optimisation
services.description: Speed up a slow machine without hardware upgrades. Startup programs, background services, disk cleanup, bloatware removal and registry optimisation. Before/after comparison provided.

services.name: Password Recovery
services.description: Locked out of Windows, macOS or even BIOS? We regain access without data loss. Local accounts, Microsoft accounts and domain logins all covered.

services.name: Email Setup
services.description: Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail or business IMAP/Exchange configured on all your devices. Signature setup, contacts synced and calendar integrated across PC, phone and tablet.

services.name: Virus Removal
services.description: Complete malware, spyware, adware and rootkit removal using professional-grade tools. Root-cause analysis to understand how you were infected and prevent it happening again.

services.name: Ransomware Recovery
services.description: Encrypted files? We attempt decryption using known decryptors, isolate the infection and secure your system against repeat attacks. Do not pay the ransom — call us first.

services.name: Security Audit
services.description: Full vulnerability assessment of your home or business network and connected devices. We produce a written report with prioritised recommendations — actionable, not just a list of risks.

services.name: Parental Controls Setup
services.description: Safe browsing filters, screen time limits, content categorisation and app restrictions configured across all family devices — router level and per-device for maximum coverage.

services.name: VPN & Privacy Setup
services.description: Encrypted VPN, private DNS (AdGuard / NextDNS), tracker blocking and privacy-hardened browser configured correctly so they actually work — not just installed and forgotten.

services.name: Two-Factor Authentication
services.description: 2FA configured across email, banking, social media and cloud accounts using an authenticator app. Backup codes stored safely. Hardware key (YubiKey) setup also available.

services.name: Hard Drive Recovery
services.description: Recover files from failed, damaged, formatted or accidental deletion scenarios. Logical and minor mechanical issues covered in-house. No data, no fee — always.

services.name: SSD Data Recovery
services.description: Specialist recovery from failed SSDs including NVMe, M.2 and SATA formats. Controller failure, NAND issues and firmware corruption all diagnosed. Clean-room referral for severe cases.

services.name: Photo & Video Recovery
services.description: Deleted photos, corrupted SD cards, formatted drives and crashed camera storage recovered using professional imaging tools. JPEG, RAW, MP4, MOV all supported.

services.name: Cloud Backup Setup
services.description: Automated backup to OneDrive, Google Drive, iCloud or Backblaze configured and tested. Versioning enabled, schedule set, alerts configured. Never lose data again.

services.name: Data Migration
services.description: Move everything from old to new device — files, settings, apps, browser bookmarks, email, contacts and accounts. We verify every folder before leaving your home.

services.name: RAID Recovery
services.description: RAID 0, 1, 5 and 10 array recovery for home NAS devices and small business servers. Synology, QNAP and custom arrays. Array rebuild and health monitoring setup included.

services.name: WiFi Setup & Configuration
services.description: Router setup, SSID configuration, WPA3 security, optimal channel selection and band steering. ISP router or own equipment — we make it fast, stable and secure.

services.name: WiFi Dead Zone Fix
services.description: Mesh systems, access points and powerline adapters to eliminate weak signal areas. We do a full site survey before recommending the right solution for your property layout.

services.name: Smart Home Setup
services.description: Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, Philips Hue, smart plugs, Ring doorbells and thermostats — configured, automated and integrated so everything works together seamlessly.

services.name: Network Security Hardening
services.description: Firewall rules, guest network isolation, MAC address filtering, firmware updates and DNS-level ad blocking. Your home network, locked down properly.

services.name: Printer Setup
services.description: Wired or wireless printer connected to all devices in your home. Scan-to-email, mobile printing via AirPrint or Google Cloud Print, and fax-to-email where applicable.

services.name: NAS / Home Server Setup
services.description: Synology, QNAP or custom NAS configured for media streaming (Plex/Jellyfin), automated backup, remote access and RAID protection. Everything set up, tested and explained.

services.name: Remote Session — 30 min
services.description: Quick remote session via secure screen share. Perfect for software glitches, settings, account issues and quick fixes. No travel charge. Available same day, often within the hour.

services.name: Remote Session — 1 Hour
services.description: Extended remote session for more complex software problems — virus scans, system optimisation, driver conflicts and configuration issues. No waiting, no travel, no hassle.

services.name: Business Remote Plan
services.description: Monthly remote support retainer for small businesses. Dedicated technician, guaranteed 4-hour response, unlimited remote sessions and quarterly security audits. Billed monthly, cancel anytime.

services.name: New Laptop Setup
services.description: Unbox, Windows activation, all drivers installed, your apps set up and data migrated from your old laptop. Accounts signed in, email configured, printer connected. Ready to use immediately.

services.name: New PC Setup
services.description: Windows activation, all drivers, software installation, security configuration and peripheral setup. Existing files migrated from old machine. We don't leave until everything works.

services.name: New Phone Setup
services.description: iPhone or Android — contacts, photos, apps, messages and accounts transferred from your old phone. WhatsApp history migrated. Everything works from day one, nothing lost.

services.name: Smart TV Setup
services.description: Netflix, Prime, Disney+, Apple TV+ and other streaming services signed in and configured. Screencasting, HDMI-ARC, soundbar pairing and parental controls all included.

services.name: MacBook Screen Replacement
services.description: OEM-quality Retina and Liquid Retina displays for all MacBook Air and Pro models (M1, M2, M3, Intel). Colour calibrated and True Tone restored after fitting.

services.name: MacBook Battery Replacement
services.description: Apple-spec capacity cells that pass Apple's own battery health diagnostic. Covers all MacBook models including MagSafe and USB-C. Cycle count reset confirmed.

services.name: macOS Reinstall
services.description: Clean macOS install, Time Machine restore or fresh setup with data migration. Sonoma, Ventura, Monterey all covered. Data backed up before any work begins.

services.name: iPhone Screen Repair
services.description: OEM-quality OLED and LCD screens for all iPhone models (12 through 16 Pro Max). True Tone, Face ID and ProMotion 120Hz all preserved. 90-day parts warranty included.

services.name: iPhone Battery Replacement
services.description: Genuine-spec cells that restore your battery capacity to 100% and pass Apple's battery health check. Covers iPhone 12 through 16. Maximum capacity guarantee.

services.name: Mac Upgrade (RAM / SSD)
services.description: Upgrade older Intel Macs with faster SSDs and more RAM for a significant performance boost. iMac, Mac Mini and older MacBook Pro models supported. Data migrated, nothing lost.

services.name: Same-Day Emergency Callout
services.description: Priority engineer dispatched to your location — available 7 days a week including bank holidays. WhatsApp ETA tracking from the moment of booking. 100% upfront payment required for emergency slots.

services.name: Out-of-Hours Callout
services.description: Evening (after 6pm) and weekend emergency response for critical issues that genuinely can't wait. Surcharge applies for out-of-hours visits — shown transparently before payment.

services.name: Business Critical Response
services.description: Server down, ransomware attack or total network failure? Priority dispatch for business-critical emergencies. Remote triage begins immediately while engineer is en route.

services.name: Pre-Event Tech Check
services.description: Presentation tomorrow? Conference next week? We come to your location in advance and ensure every piece of tech works perfectly — projectors, laptops, AV, WiFi and backup plans.
